notes: Expected success output for case_002_hairpin_success. Hashes were computed from the corresponding hairpin_success.input.json fixture using the merged TASK-016 implementation (PR #67 merge commit ac7a4152698f039b4d6795f6a814228cb3c43def) at the time of TASK-016-TRIAL-002. The hairpin record references both approved tube and approved pipe records; both reference validations pass and the catalog loads successfully. The canonical ordering rule sorts by (geometry_type, geometry_id, revision, record_hash) per design section 7.2: hairpin comes first because geometry_type 'hairpin' sorts before 'pipe' and 'tube'.
